questions.question: Explain the difference between Framing and Flow Control in the context of link control. Provide one example of each.
questions.hint: Framing and Flow Control are essential link control functions in data communication.

questions.question: Describe the difference between Connectionless and Connection Oriented data transmission. Provide an example of a scenario where Connectionless transmission is more suitable.
questions.hint: Understanding the differences between Connectionless and Connection Oriented transmission is crucial for designing reliable data networks.

questions.question: Explain the concept of Error Control in the data link layer, and provide an example of a simple Error Detection technique (e.g., parity bit).
questions.hint: Error Control is an essential function in the data link layer that ensures data integrity and reliability.
